summary: react-simple-utils-kit postinstall executes child_process and exfiltrates host data over HTTP
details: The package's postinstall.js (executed automatically on `npm install`) imports child_process and issues an HTTP POST carrying host/identity data. The combination of an install-time lifecycle hook, child_process invocation, and outbound POST of identifier fields matches the install-time data-collection / RCE-staging pattern seen in supply-chain attacks. The package name pattern ("react-simple-utils-kit") is a generic-utility lure with no legitimate need to spawn subprocesses or beacon out at install time. Installing this package causes the postinstall script to run on the developer's or CI machine without consent.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
